0x40fb07a0.name: buyAsset
0x40fb07a0.reason: user GSM swap: buy underlying (USDC) with GHO at fixed price; minAmount = min underlying out. Maps to amm::GsmSwap (side=buy_asset).

0xaa443ac0.name: sellAsset
0xaa443ac0.reason: user GSM swap: sell underlying (USDC) for GHO at fixed price; maxAmount = max underlying in. Maps to amm::GsmSwap (side=sell_asset).

0x954c1c0d.name: buyAssetWithSig
0x954c1c0d.reason: relayer-submit: on-chain consumer of an off-chain EIP-712 BuyAsset signature (originator,deadline,sig). Signer risk captured at the off-chain sign; deferred typed-data follow-up. Mirrors metaDelegate / setAuthorizationWithSig EXCLUDE.

0xf493ca70.name: sellAssetWithSig
0xf493ca70.reason: relayer-submit: on-chain consumer of an off-chain EIP-712 SellAsset signature; deferred typed-data follow-up.

0x9b5c9261.name: backWithGho
0x9b5c9261.reason: keeper/governance: inject GHO backing to restore GSM solvency, not a user pre-sign action.

0xc350de6c.name: backWithUnderlying
0xc350de6c.reason: keeper/governance: inject underlying backing, not user pre-sign.

0xdc49a07b.name: distributeFeesToTreasury
0xdc49a07b.reason: keeper: permissionless fee sweep to treasury, no user funds at risk.
